heading: Medal of honor: duplicate medal
label: 9284 Medal of honor: duplicate medal
text: A person awarded a medal of honor shall, upon written application of that person, be issued, without charge, one duplicate medal of honor with ribbons and appurtenances. Such duplicate medal of honor shall be marked, in such manner as the Secretary of the Air Force may determine, as a duplicate or for display purposes only.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8754 of this title
